Off Calendar May-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS' PETER BRIGER, MARC FURSTEIN, DEAN DAKOLIAS, and FORTRESS INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC's Motion To Seal Plaintiffs Financial Compensation

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' unopposed "motion to seal plaintiff's financial compensation" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Tobias Snyder, Esq. (415-480-0663; tsnyder@lewisllewellyn.com) of Lewis & Llewellyn LLP for Plaintiff.
Lisa Demsky, Esq. (213-683-4051; Lisa.Demsky@mto.com) of Munger, Tolles & Olson LLP for Defendants.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS PETER BRIGER, MARC FURSTEIN, DEAN DAKOLIAS and FORTRESS INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Proceedings is granted.

See word minutes for details.

Order is signed.
